message:
fix: firewall test databases from production Dolt server (Clown Shows #12-#18)

Three layers of defense against test pollution on production port 3307:

1. store.go: isTestDatabaseName() pattern-based guard refuses to CREATE DATABASE
   for any test-prefixed name on DefaultSQLPort (3307). Not env-var dependent.

2. testdoltserver.go: StartTestDoltServer now refuses to reuse port 3307
   regardless of BEADS_TEST_MODE setting. Previous code only checked when
   BEADS_TEST_MODE=1, but TestMain sets that AFTER calling StartTestDoltServer.

3. testdoltbranch.go: SetupSharedTestDB refuses to connect to port 3307.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
